color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
1 · story-analyzer · Sonnet
Extracts fields, validations,
flows, test scenarios, invariants

div.style: color: rgb(113, 63, 18) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
2a · design-analyzer · Sonnet
UI spec, component hierarchy
Tailwind, responsive, states

div.style: color: rgb(113, 63, 18) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
2b · api-contract · Sonnet
Mode A reads OpenAPI spec
Mode B proposes plus MSW mocks
Mode C full mock server

div.style: color: rgb(88, 28, 135) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
3 · planner · Opus
Creates task list, assigns agents
file manifest, resource limits
MAX 15 tasks / 5 teammates

div.style: color: rgb(124, 45, 18) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
4 · tdd-runner RED · Sonnet
Writes tests FIRST from story
Confirms all tests FAIL

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
5 · feature-dev · Sonnet
Implements types, schemas,
services, hooks, components,
pages in dependency order

div.style: color: rgb(131, 24, 67) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
6a · code-reviewer · Sonnet
SonarQube, skill patterns
Story traceability
Max 2 review cycles

div.style: color: rgb(131, 24, 67) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
6b · security-reviewer · Sonnet
OWASP Top 10, XSS
Token security, RBAC, PII

div.style: color: rgb(131, 24, 67) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
6c · e2e-runner · Sonnet
Playwright tests from
acceptance criteria via POM

div.style: color: rgb(124, 45, 18) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
7 · tdd-runner GREEN · Sonnet
Runs all tests
Confirms PASS and 80pct coverage

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
8 · ci-cd-manager · Haiku
Branch, atomic commits
PR with story traceability
GitHub Actions CI check

div.style: color: rgb(51, 65, 85) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
build-fixer · Haiku
Fixes TS, lint, build errors
Circuit breaker 3 attempts
then escalates to human
